select_when: The team is making consequential judgments under pressure, ambiguity, or strong prior beliefs that can quietly distort perception.
Decisions need explicit debiasing moves such as outside views, disconfirming evidence, or structured challenge instead of trust in intuition alone.
Unexamined confidence is more dangerous than adding a little extra friction to the reasoning process.
avoid_when: Bias language is being used as a rhetorical weapon against opponents while the speaker avoids inspecting their own incentives, evidence, and assumptions.
The group wants a generic warning label instead of a concrete debiasing move tied to the actual decision structure.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model focused on diagnosing distorted judgment and forcing explicit debiasing moves rather than listing every named bias.
donor_drops: No donor-only normalization was kept when the raw source already supported a cleaner bounded routing identity.
open_questions: Wave 4 remains observational only for this model until a later selective review explicitly earns higher-order treatment.

select_when.note: Select conditions compress explicit application-context guidance from the raw markdown.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions compress explicit dangers and anti-patterns from the raw markdown.

input_type.note: The typed input label compresses the recurring decision structure named in the raw source.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention artifact implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning types reflect the minimal current Layer 2B vocabulary needed to preserve how the model operates.
